Games

TOP TRADER

The Schizo Trading Game

Compete in a trading simulation game with up to 1,000x leverage. The best player gets 50% of the pot, and other top players get the rest. Leverage the unleveraged, unbank the banked.

The game that took web3 by storm is now available worldwide and open to everyone. Play to win up to $1,000,000 in prizes.

A Club Full of Builders

BATTLE PLAN

The game with real stakes

Assemble your team and compete to win in this auto-brawler with real stakes. Victories in the game translate to tangible rewards, allowing players to trade or sell their winnings.
